nasb.text: and they said, “Has the Lord indeed spoken only through Moses? Has He not spoken through us as well?” And the Lord heard it.

esv.text: And they said, “Has the Lord indeed spoken only through Moses? Has he not spoken through us also?” And the Lord heard it.

cnv.text: 他們說：“難道耶和華單單與摩西說話，不也與我們說話嗎？”這話耶和華聽見了。

ccb.text: “难道耶和华只借着摩西说话吗？祂不也借着我们说话吗？”耶和华听见了这话。
